properties.name: East Coast Region
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundaries represented by U.S. Census state and district boundaries
properties.notes: Umbrella region following the generally understood East Coast of the United States: Atlantic-bordering states CT, DE, FL, GA, ME, MD, MA, NH, NJ, NY, NC, RI, SC, and VA, plus PA, VT, WV, and DC. This intentionally excludes OH, KY, and TN.
properties.coordination_notes: This region follows an established political or public administrative boundary rather than a New England Mesh-defined boundary.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Northeast Region
properties.boundary_basis: Existing U.S. Census Bureau Northeast region boundary represented by Census state boundaries
properties.notes: Umbrella region following the Census-defined Northeastern United States: Pennsylvania, New Jersey, New York, and New England. This intentionally excludes Delaware, Maryland, Virginia, and Ohio.
properties.coordination_notes: This region follows an established political or public administrative boundary rather than a New England Mesh-defined boundary.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Maine
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundary represented by a U.S. Census state boundary
properties.notes: Covers all terrestrial Maine.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: New Hampshire
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundary represented by a U.S. Census state boundary
properties.notes: Covers all terrestrial New Hampshire.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Vermont
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundary represented by a U.S. Census state boundary
properties.notes: Covers all terrestrial Vermont.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Boston / Eastern Massachusetts
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county boundaries
properties.notes: Eastern Massachusetts plus southern/eastern New Hampshire; overlaps WMA, NH, RI, and CT-RV.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Pioneer Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county boundaries
properties.notes: Pioneer Valley region.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Western Massachusetts
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by a U.S. Census county boundary
properties.notes: Western Massachusetts west of the Pioneer Valley.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Berkshires / Western Massachusetts Proposal
properties.boundary_basis: Community proposal to rename the existing WMA boundary, represented by a U.S. Census county boundary
properties.notes: Proposed rename of the existing WMA region. The boundary remains Berkshire County and does not include Pioneer Valley counties.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is proposed for coordinator review and has not been voted into the official New England Mesh region set.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Connecticut
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundary represented by U.S. Census planning-region boundaries
properties.notes: Covers all terrestrial Connecticut.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Connecticut River Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county and planning-region boundaries
properties.notes: North-south overlap along the Connecticut River corridor.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Rhode Island
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundary represented by a U.S. Census state boundary
properties.notes: Covers all terrestrial Rhode Island.
properties.coordination_notes: This region is within New England and has been voted on by New England Mesh. Boundaries may be adjusted as the group evolves.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Sullivan County / MSV
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by a U.S. Census county boundary
properties.notes: Sullivan County has an active ARES group and is expected to coordinate its own emcomm region.
properties.coordination_notes: This is a suggested coordination area, not a boundary defined by New England Mesh.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Hudson River Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus umbrella region formed from ALB, HV, and NYC, with a 15-mile lower-Hudson Long Island cutoff
properties.notes: Umbrella Hudson River Valley region defined as the union of the Albany / Capital Region, Hudson Valley, and New York City / Lower Hudson regions. Only the Long Island portion is clipped at the straight north-south line -73.72, approximately 15 miles east of the lower Hudson at Manhattan.
properties.coordination_notes: This is a suggested coordination area, not a boundary defined by New England Mesh.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Adirondacks
properties.boundary_basis: Existing public boundary published by the NYS Adirondack Park Agency
properties.notes: Official Adirondack Park boundary normalized to the exterior ring so inholdings do not create holes.
properties.coordination_notes: This region follows an established political or public administrative boundary rather than a New England Mesh-defined boundary.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Erie Canal Corridor
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus corridor represented by U.S. Census county boundaries and the ALB region
properties.notes: Canal corridor from Buffalo/Niagara east through the Mohawk Valley and Albany / Capital Region. It includes Fulton County up to the Adirondack boundary and excludes Adirondack Park.
properties.coordination_notes: This is a suggested coordination area, not a boundary defined by New England Mesh.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: New York City / Lower Hudson
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county boundaries
properties.notes: NYC and lower Hudson region near HUD. Dutchess, Orange, and Putnam are left to HV.
properties.coordination_notes: This external region has been coordinated with people operating in that area.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Hudson Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county boundaries
properties.notes: Hudson Valley region inside HUD, excluding MSV and Westchester.
properties.coordination_notes: This external region has been coordinated with people operating in that area.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Albany / Capital Region
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county boundaries
properties.notes: Capital Region / Albany region inside HUD, excluding Adirondack Park.
properties.coordination_notes: This external region has been coordinated with people operating in that area.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files

properties.name: Mohawk Valley
properties.boundary_basis: Community consensus boundary represented by U.S. Census county boundaries
properties.notes: Mohawk Valley adjacent region, excluding Adirondack Park.
properties.coordination_notes: This external region has been coordinated with people operating in that area.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files
